textPlain: Many sites do it .Included in many standard device fingerprinting / anti anonymity SAAS. Ebay facebook etc all do this ! But it looks this is first party to prevent the adblocking of them1MB of obfuscated fingerprinting + portscan  +  Webgl  . But oddity this one is trying to find burp suite specific route's.
Perhaps to avoid people using misconfigured open proxies https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_proxyLike a less sophisticated Tor/VPN that is easily detected by port scans
